passiveAbilities.name: Dagger
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Swift
passiveAbilities.description: When making a Reaction Step while engaged by an enemy, this model may move 2” instead of the usual 1”

passiveAbilities.name: Sure Footed
passiveAbilities.description: This character may Jog over Water Features and Wooded Patches and pays 1 less energy for Traverse actions.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Bow
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Piercing Dmg.
Catastrophe: This ability cannot be used for the remainder of the game.

signatureMove.name: Mercy Kill
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is slain, this character gains 1 energy.
